2026-0710
2026-07-16PMOPublic Service Employment ActReappointment of the Commissioner of the Public Service CommissionRe-appointment of Fiona Spencer of Vancouver, British Columbia, as a Commissioner of the Public Service Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two-years, on a part-time basis, effective September 16, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of the Commissioner of the Public Service Commission
precis: Re-appointment of Fiona Spencer of Vancouver, British Columbia, as a Commissioner of the Public Service Commission, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two-years, on a part-time basis, effective September 16, 2026.
